raw_model_answer:
STEP 1: Rinse mouth thoroughly with water immediately.
STEP 2: Drink 1-2 glasses of water.
STEP 3: Seek medical attention immediately.
DO NOT: Induce vomiting unless told to do so by a poison control center or doctor.
ESCALATE: Call emergency services or a Poison Control Center. Have the product label/SDS ready.

immediate_steps: Rinse mouth thoroughly with water immediately.
do_not_do: Induce vomiting unless told to do so by a poison control center or doctor.
escalate_when: Call emergency services or a Poison Control Center. Have the product label/SDS ready.
